description: Lock the 2026-06-24 rescope of merchant_marine_registry to British Custom House merchant ship registration rather than broad voyage, crew, or insurance records.

checks.reason: The node is anchored to Royal Museums Greenwich's 1661 Custom House registration requirement for foreign-built ships, not the previous 1680 placeholder.
Voyage logbooks are adjacent maritime records, not a direct prerequisite for official ship registration.
The insurance node is scoped to fire-insurance claims assessment and does not directly enable Custom House ship registration.
Ship registration was administered through Custom House and port Customs record systems.
